title: Michael Jackson Official Website
text: Michael Jackson was one of the most influential artists in popular music. His official website contains information about his albums, songs, videos, and legacy.

title: Michael Jackson GRAMMY Profile
text: Michael Jackson received many Grammy Awards and became one of the most awarded and recognized artists in music history. His Grammy profile includes information about his nominations, wins, and important career moments.

title: Michael Jackson Britannica Biography
text: Michael Jackson was born in Gary, Indiana, in 1958. He became famous as a child performer with the Jackson 5 and later became a global solo artist with albums such as Off the Wall, Thriller, Bad, Dangerous, and HIStory.

title: Michael Jackson Rock Hall
text: Michael Jackson was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. He influenced pop music, dance, music videos, and live performance. His work changed the standards of popular entertainment.

title: Thriller Album
text: Thriller is one of Michael Jackson's most famous albums. It includes songs such as Billie Jean, Beat It, Thriller, and Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'. The album became a major cultural and commercial success.

title: Billie Jean
text: Billie Jean is one of Michael Jackson's most iconic songs. It is known for its bassline, vocal performance, and the famous moonwalk performance associated with the song.
